migration-v22-manifest-cache.description: Move generated prism-manifest.ts into <workspaceRoot>/ng-prism-cache/<prismProject>/ and resolve it via a wildcard tsconfig path mapping.

migration-v22-cache-dir-rename.description: Rename the manifest cache directory from .ng-prism/ to ng-prism-cache/. The dot-prefixed name was silently excluded from @angular/build's watcher (hardcoded **/.*/** ignore pattern), so @Showcase decorator edits never triggered an HMR / reload.
